seoTitle: Carramar vs Cartmeticup — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Carramar and Cartmeticup. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Carramar and Cartmeticup.
heading: Carramar vs Cartmeticup — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Carramar, Western Australia and Cartmeticup, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cartmeticup has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Carramar (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Carramar or Cartmeticup safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Carramar has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Cartmeticup scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Carramar scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Cartmeticup scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Carramar or Cartmeticup?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cartmeticup has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
